evals.expected_output: Route to Mode A Auto, detect docs frameworks, ask for an explicit target when multiple frameworks are present, and keep all actions project-local.
assertions: Mentions Mode A Auto or equivalent auto classification.
Uses framework detection before mutating files.
Asks for clarification when multiple frameworks are detected.

evals.expected_output: Route to Mode C Sync, run framework-appropriate generation or sync checks, and report validation/build commands.
assertions: Mentions Sync mode or framework-native sync/generation.
Includes validation or build verification after docs mutation.
Does not perform unrelated application implementation.

evals.expected_output: Route to Mode E Maintain and produce a read-only diagnostics report with severity levels and next commands.
assertions: Treats Maintain as read-only.
Uses Critical, Warning, Suggestion, or equivalent severity labels.
Reports next commands without editing files.

evals.expected_output: Route to Mode G Matrix and inspect all detected docs frameworks in deterministic order.
assertions: Mentions matrix or all-framework inspection.
Uses the deterministic framework order from the skill.
Separates findings by framework or docs root.

evals.expected_output: Route to Mode B with Docusaurus as the explicit framework target and run the requested action only for that framework.
assertions: Honors the explicit framework target.
Does not ask for framework selection when the target is explicit.
Uses the matching framework reference guidance.

evals.prompt: Please sync the docs after these documentation changes.
evals.expected_output: Infer docs-steward, classify the docs intent, and choose sync or enhance based on changed docs surfaces.
assertions: Activates docs-steward behavior without an explicit slash command.
Classifies the docs intent before editing.
Keeps work scoped to documentation surfaces.

evals.prompt: This repo has code but no docs site yet. Set up docs without destroying anything.
evals.expected_output: Route to Mode I Init or init-sync, perform a non-destructive preflight, and create only missing project-local docs scaffold files.
assertions: Performs a preflight before creating files.
Preserves existing docs roots and content.
Keeps bootstrap project-local.

evals.expected_output: Route to Mode I Init and use the non-destructive docs bootstrap contract.
assertions: Mentions Init mode or non-destructive bootstrap.
Checks for existing docs roots before creating files.
Reports created and skipped files.

evals.expected_output: Route to Init followed by Sync, preserving the non-destructive bootstrap contract before running framework-native sync checks.
assertions: Runs or describes Init before Sync.
Does not replace non-empty docs roots.
Includes follow-up validation commands.

evals.prompt: CI headless run: /docs-steward auto on this monorepo with Docusaurus and MkDocs; prompts are disabled.
evals.expected_output: Apply the Headless Fallback Contract, run a read-only Maintain matrix in deterministic framework order, warn about fallback, and skip mutating modes until an explicit target is supplied.
assertions: Detects headless ambiguity.
Downgrades to read-only Maintain or Matrix.
Does not run mutating sync, enhance, init, or migrate steps.

evals.prompt: Automatically sync all docs in CI for a repo with Starlight and Sphinx docs.
evals.expected_output: Refuse unsafe multi-framework auto-sync in headless mode and produce a read-only matrix report with explicit next commands.
assertions: Refuses or defers mutating auto-sync.
Explains the multi-framework headless safety rule.
Provides explicit framework-targeted next commands.

evals.prompt: The docs config and sidebar changed; sync the site structure.
evals.expected_output: Classify structure/config changes and route to Sync plus Maintain verification.
assertions: Classifies structure or config docs changes.
Routes to Sync before Maintain verification.
Includes framework-specific build or health checks.

evals.prompt: Docs dependencies are out of date; refresh to the latest supported framework versions.
evals.expected_output: Classify dependency/version intent, require registry-backed research before claiming latest, then propose update and validation steps.
assertions: Does not claim latest without evidence.
Routes through Research before Sync or updates.
Records source and date for version evidence.

evals.expected_output: Route to Mode F Research, gather registry-backed framework evidence, refresh reference snapshots, and distinguish verified facts from recommendations.
assertions: Uses authoritative version evidence.
Records source and date.
Separates facts from proposed updates.

evals.expected_output: Route to Mode H Migrate, parse source and target frameworks, create phased reversible migration steps, and keep checkpoints explicit.
assertions: Identifies source and target frameworks correctly.
Uses phased reversible checkpoints.
Includes validation and rollback criteria.

evals.expected_output: Ask a clarifying question for missing source and target frameworks instead of guessing or mutating files.
assertions: Does not guess the migration source or target.
Asks for source and target framework names.
Does not edit files before clarification.

evals.expected_output: Route to Mode J Generate API, run or reference the API extraction and coverage scripts, produce source-traced API markdown, and flag undocumented public symbols.
assertions: Mentions api-surface-extractor.py and doc-coverage-analyzer.py.
Preserves exact extracted signatures and docstrings.
Flags undocumented public symbols instead of fabricating docs.

evals.expected_output: Route to Mode J Generate ADR, use the ADR scaffolder/template, ask for missing decision context when needed, and present the ADR before writing.
assertions: Uses adr-scaffolder.py or data/adr-template.json.
Asks for missing context or decision details when needed.
Treats writing the ADR as approval-gated when output paths are involved.

evals.prompt: Create a runbook for the docs deployment flow from the existing repo scripts.
evals.expected_output: Infer Mode J Generate Runbook, extract commands from repository evidence, and flag unknown operational details instead of inventing them.
assertions: Routes to a generate runbook workflow.
Traces commands and procedures to repository evidence.
Flags missing evidence rather than fabricating operational steps.

evals.expected_output: Use the advanced components reference to choose framework-native components with accessible fallbacks and verify rendering/build behavior.
assertions: Loads or follows references/advanced-components.md.
Uses framework-native components instead of generic decorative markup.
Includes accessibility and fallback checks.

evals.prompt: Improve the docs in this repo; it has Docusaurus and MkDocs directories.
evals.expected_output: Detect multiple framework candidates and ask which docs root/framework to mutate, or fall back to read-only maintain in headless mode.
assertions: Detects multiple docs frameworks.
Asks for target selection before mutating files.
Offers a read-only maintain fallback when prompting is unavailable.

evals.prompt: /docs-steward auto on a repo with no recognizable docs framework
evals.expected_output: Return a read-only maintain-style report explaining that no supported docs framework was detected and ask for an explicit target before mutating.
assertions: Does not assume a docs framework.
Returns a read-only report.
Asks for an explicit framework target or init instruction.

evals.prompt: Build a FastAPI backend with JWT auth and Postgres migrations.
evals.expected_output: Refuse or redirect as out of scope for docs-steward, explaining that backend/API implementation belongs to another skill.
assertions: Does not implement backend code.
Explains docs-steward scope boundaries.
Redirects to an API/backend-oriented skill or workflow.

evals.prompt: Update the project README after the docs workflow changed, using clear advanced GitHub-flavored Markdown.
evals.expected_output: Classify the request as a docs-surface update, update only source-grounded README sections when docs behavior changed, and verify markdown links or relevant docs checks.
assertions: Treats README as an in-scope docs-facing surface when documentation behavior changed.
Uses source-grounded content and advanced GFM where helpful.
Does not edit unrelated product or backend code.

evals.prompt: Sync nested AGENTS.md instructions after changing docs stewardship behavior.
evals.expected_output: Classify nested AGENTS.md files as docs/instruction surfaces, update only relevant source-grounded guidance, and preserve skill-creator ownership of skill definition edits.
assertions: Treats nested AGENTS.md files as in-scope documentation/instruction surfaces when docs behavior changed.
Keeps updates source-grounded and project-local.
Does not create or modify skill definitions unless routed to skill-creator.
